revision.text:
{{navbox | name = Yoga | title = [[Yoga]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | listclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Subtle body]] | list1 = * [[Three Bodies Doctrine|Three bodies]] * [[Kosha|Five sheaths]] * [[Chakra]] * [[Nadi (yoga)|Nadi]] ** [[Nadi (yoga)#Ida|Ida]] ** [[Nadi (yoga)#Sushumna|Sushumna]] ** [[Nadi (yoga)#Pingala|Pingala]] * [[Prana]]
| group2 = [[Hinduism]] | list2 = {{navbox|child
| group1 = [[Three Yogas]] | list1 = * [[Karma yoga]] * [[Bhakti yoga]] * [[Jnana yoga]] * ''and sometimes'' [[Rāja yoga]]
| group2 = [[Yoga (philosophy)|Philosophy]] | list2 = * ''[[Bhagavad Gita]]'' * ''[[Yoga Sutras of Patanjali]]'' * ''[[Yoga Vasistha]]'' * ''[[Yoga Yajnavalkya]]''
| group3 = Concepts | list3 = * [[Ashtanga (eight limbs of yoga)|Eight limbs]] ** [[Yamas|Yama]] ** [[Niyama]] ** [[Asana]] *** [[Lotus position]] ** [[Pranayama]] ** [[Pratyahara]] ** [[Dhāraṇā]] ** [[Dhyana in Hinduism|Dhyana]] ** [[Samadhi]] * [[Kriyā]] * [[Mantra]] ** [[Pranava yoga|Pranava]] ** [[Nāda yoga|Nada]] ** [[Surat Shabd Yoga|Surat Shabd]] ** [[Aghor Yoga]] * [[Mudra#Yoga|Mudras]] ** [[Bandha (yoga)|Bandha]] ** [[Mahamudra (Hatha Yoga)|Mahamudra]] ** [[Viparita Karani]] ** [[List of mudras (yoga)|List]] * [[Nyasa (ritual)|Nyasa]] * [[Kumbhaka]] * [[Sama vritti]] * [[Shatkarma|Shatkarmas]] ** [[Neti (Hatha Yoga)|Neti]] ** [[Dhauti]] ** [[Nauli]] ** [[Basti (hatha yoga)|Basti]] ** [[Kapalabhati]] ** [[Bhastrika]] ** [[Trāṭaka|Trataka]] * [[Tapas_(Indian_religions)#Yoga_and_brahmacharya|Tapas]] * [[Sādhanā]]
| group4 = [[Tantra]] | list4 = * [[Yogi]] * [[Yogini]] * [[Siddhi]] ** [[Mahasiddha]] ** [[Shaiva Siddhanta]] * [[Laya Yoga]] ** [[Kundalini]] * [[Tantric sex|Sexual Yoga]]
| group5 = [[Hatha yoga]] | list5 = * ''[[Amaraugha Prabodha]]'' * ''[[Amritasiddhi]]'' * ''[[Bahr al-Hayat]]'' * ''[[Haṭhābhyāsapaddhati|Hathabhyasapaddhati]]'' * ''[[Haṭha Ratnāvalī|Hatha Ratnavali]]'' * ''[[Hatha Yoga Pradipika]]'' * ''[[Hatha Yoga: The Report of a Personal Experience]]'' * ''[[Gheranda Samhita]]'' * ''[[Joga Pradīpikā|Joga Pradipika]]'' * ''[[Shiva Samhita]]'' * ''[[Sritattvanidhi]]'' * ''[[Vasishtha Samhita]]'' * ''[[Vimanarcanakalpa]]'' * ''[[Yogasopana Purvacatuska]]'' }}
| group3 = [[Buddhism]] | list3 = {{navbox|child
| group1 = [[Theravada]] | list1 = * [[Samatha]] * [[Samadhi (Buddhism)]] * [[Vipassanā|Vipassana]] * [[Anapanasati]] * ''[[Visuddhimagga]]''
| group2 = [[Mahayana]] | list2 = * India ** [[Yogachara]] * Japan ** [[Tendai]] ** [[Zazen]]
| group3 = [[Vajrayana]] | list3 = * India ** [[Classes of Tantra in Tibetan Buddhism#Kriyayoga|Kriyayoga (Buddhist)]] ** [[Classes of Tantra in Tibetan Buddhism#Caryayoga|Caryayoga]] ** [[Classes of Tantra in Tibetan Buddhism#Anuttarayoga|Anuttarayoga]] ** [[Sahajayana]] * Tibet ** [[Tibetan tantric practice|Devata yoga]] ** [[Trul khor|Yantra yoga]] ** [[Six Dharmas of Naropa|Six Yogas of Naropa]] *** [[Tummo]] *** [[Luminous mind|Ösel]] *** [[Karmamudra]] *** [[Dream yoga|Milam]] *** [[Bardo]] *** [[Phowa]] ** [[Mahayoga]] ** [[Anuyoga]] ** [[Atiyoga]] ** [[Mahamudra]] * China ** [[Chinese Esoteric Buddhism|Tangmi]] * Japan ** [[Shingon]] }}
| group4 = [[Modern yoga|Modern]] | list4 = {{navbox|child
| group1 = [[Yoga as exercise|As exercise]] | list1 = * [[Asana]] ** [[Downward Dog Pose|Downward dog]] ** [[Standing asanas]] ** [[List of asanas]] * [[Drishti (yoga)|Drishti]] * [[Sun Salutation]] * [[Vinyāsa]] ** [[Hasta Vinyasas]] * [[Yoga as therapy]] * [[Yoga for women]] * [[Yoga using props|Props]] * ''[[Light on Yoga]]''
| group2 = Related | list2 = * [[List of yoga hybrids|Yoga hybrids]] ** [[Mindful Yoga]] * [[International Day of Yoga]] * [[List of yoga schools]] * [[Modern yoga gurus]] * [[Yoga Nidra]] * [[:Template:Yoga scholars|Yoga scholars (template)]] * Journals ** ''[[Asana Journal]]'' ** ''[[Yoga Journal]]'' }}
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

{{navbox | name = Yoga | title = [[Yoga]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | listclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Subtle body]] | list1 = * [[Three Bodies Doctrine|Three bodies]] * [[Kosha|Five sheaths]] * [[Chakra]] * [[Nadi (yoga)|Nadi]] ** [[Nadi (yoga)#Ida|Ida]] ** [[Nadi (yoga)#Sushumna|Sushumna]] ** [[Nadi (yoga)#Pingala|Pingala]] * [[Prana]]
| group2 = [[Hinduism]] | list2 = {{navbox|child
| group1 = [[Three Yogas]] | list1 = * [[Karma yoga]] * [[Bhakti yoga]] * [[Jnana yoga]] * ''and sometimes'' [[Rāja yoga]]
| group2 = [[Yoga (philosophy)|Philosophy]] | list2 = * ''[[Bhagavad Gita]]'' * ''[[Yoga Sutras of Patanjali]]'' * ''[[Yoga Vasistha]]'' * ''[[Yoga Yajnavalkya]]''
| group3 = Concepts | list3 = * [[Ashtanga (eight limbs of yoga)|Eight limbs]] ** [[Yamas|Yama]] ** [[Niyama]] ** [[Asana]] *** [[Lotus position]] ** [[Pranayama]] ** [[Pratyahara]] ** [[Dhāraṇā]] ** [[Dhyana in Hinduism|Dhyana]] ** [[Samadhi]] * [[Kriyā]] * [[Mantra]] ** [[Pranava yoga|Pranava]] ** [[Nāda yoga|Nada]] ** [[Surat Shabd Yoga|Surat Shabd]] ** [[Aghor Yoga]] * [[Mudra#Yoga|Mudras]] ** [[Bandha (yoga)|Bandha]] ** [[Mahamudra (Hatha Yoga)|Mahamudra]] ** [[Viparita Karani]] ** [[List of mudras (yoga)|List]] * [[Nyasa (ritual)|Nyasa]] * [[Kumbhaka]] * [[Sama vritti]] * [[Shatkarma|Shatkarmas]] ** [[Neti (Hatha Yoga)|Neti]] ** [[Dhauti]] ** [[Nauli]] ** [[Basti (hatha yoga)|Basti]] ** [[Kapalabhati]] ** [[Bhastrika]] ** [[Trāṭaka|Trataka]] * [[Tapas_(Indian_religions)#Yoga_and_brahmacharya|Tapas]] * [[Sādhanā]]
| group4 = [[Tantra]] | list4 = * [[Yogi]] * [[Yogini]] * [[Siddhi]] ** [[Mahasiddha]] ** [[Shaiva Siddhanta]] * [[Laya Yoga]] ** [[Kundalini]] * [[Tantric sex|Sexual Yoga]]
| group5 = [[Hatha yoga]] | list5 = * ''[[Amaraugha Prabodha]]'' * ''[[Amritasiddhi]]'' * ''[[Bahr al-Hayat]]'' * ''[[Haṭhābhyāsapaddhati|Hathabhyasapaddhati]]'' * ''[[Haṭha Ratnāvalī|Hatha Ratnavali]]'' * ''[[Hatha Yoga Pradipika]]'' * ''[[Hatha Yoga: The Report of a Personal Experience]]'' * ''[[Gheranda Samhita]]'' * ''[[Joga Pradīpikā|Joga Pradipika]]'' * ''[[Shiva Samhita]]'' * ''[[Sritattvanidhi]]'' * ''[[Vasishtha Samhita]]'' * ''[[Vimanarcanakalpa]]'' * ''[[Yogasopana Purvacatuska]]'' }}
| group3 = [[Buddhism]] | list3 = {{navbox|child
| group1 = [[Theravada]] | list1 = * [[Samatha]] * [[Samadhi (Buddhism)]] * [[Vipassanā|Vipassana]] * [[Anapanasati]] * ''[[Visuddhimagga]]''
| group2 = [[Mahayana]] | list2 = * India ** [[Yogachara]] * Japan ** [[Tendai]] ** [[Zazen]]
| group3 = [[Vajrayana]] | list3 = * India ** [[Classes of Tantra in Tibetan Buddhism#Kriyayoga|Kriyayoga (Buddhist)]] ** [[Classes of Tantra in Tibetan Buddhism#Caryayoga|Caryayoga]] ** [[Classes of Tantra in Tibetan Buddhism#Anuttarayoga|Anuttarayoga]] ** [[Sahajayana]] * Tibet ** [[Tibetan tantric practice|Devata yoga]] ** [[Trul khor|Yantra yoga]] ** [[Six Dharmas of Naropa|Six Yogas of Naropa]] *** [[Tummo]] *** [[Luminous mind|Ösel]] *** [[Karmamudra]] *** [[Dream yoga|Milam]] *** [[Bardo]] *** [[Phowa]] ** [[Mahayoga]] ** [[Anuyoga]] ** [[Atiyoga]] ** [[Mahamudra]] * China ** [[Chinese Esoteric Buddhism|Tangmi]] * Japan ** [[Shingon]] }}
| group4 = [[Modern yoga|Modern]] | list4 = {{navbox|child
| group1 = [[Yoga as exercise|As exercise]] | list1 = * [[Asana]] ** [[Downward Dog Pose|Downward dog]] ** [[Standing asanas]] ** [[List of asanas]] * [[Drishti (yoga)|Drishti]] * [[Sun Salutation]] * [[Vinyāsa]] ** [[Hasta Vinyasas]] * [[Yoga as therapy]] * [[Yoga for women]] * [[Yoga using props|Props]] * ''[[Light on Yoga]]''
| group2 = Related | list2 = * [[List of yoga hybrids|Yoga hybrids]] ** [[Mindful Yoga]] * [[International Day of Yoga]] * [[List of yoga schools]] * [[Modern yoga gurus]] * [[Yoga Nidra]] * [[:Template:Yoga scholars|Yoga scholars (template)]] * Journals ** ''[[Asana Journal]]'' ** ''[[Yoga Journal]]'' }}
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23697958099|commit triggered pipeline]]
